title: There are a lot of features that need to be considered like

posts.author: Qutaiba (Qutaiba )
posts.cookedHtml:
Reports to PDF from Dashboard so we can share it with our management

  • Typing editor enabling, when we miss typo the chrome editor can’t edit inside the task cell

  • And the gallery to file tab for uploaded files, when I add file to gallery need to sync with file tab
